name: adaptability
description: increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5ã— to 2ã—.

name: aftermath
description: damages the attacker for 1/4 its max hp when knocked out by a contact move.

name: air-lock
description: negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.

name: anger-point
description: raises attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.

name: anticipation
description: notifies all trainers upon entering battle if an opponent has a super-effective move, self-destruct, explosion, or a one-hit ko move.

name: bad-dreams
description: damages sleeping opponents for 1/8 their max hp after each turn.

name: battery
description: ally monster's moves have their power increased to 1.3ã—.

name: battle-armor
description: protects against critical hits.

name: beast-boost
description: raises this monster's highest stat by one stage when it faints another monster.

name: big-pecks
description: protects against defense drops.

name: blaze
description: strengthens fire moves to inflict 1.5ã— damage at 1/3 max hp or less.

name: chlorophyll
description: doubles speed during strong sunlight.

name: clear-body
description: prevents stats from being lowered by other monster.

name: cloud-nine
description: negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.

name: competitive
description: raises special attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.

name: compound-eyes
description: increases moves' accuracy to 1.3ã—.

name: cursed-body
description: has a 30% chance of disabling any move that hits the monster.

name: cute-charm
description: has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking monster on contact.

name: damp
description: prevents self-destruct, explosion, and aftermath from working while the monster is in battle.

name: defeatist
description: halves attack and special attack at 50% max hp or less.

name: defiant
description: raises attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.

name: disguise
description: prevents the first instance of battle damage.

name: drizzle
description: summons rain that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

name: drought
description: summons strong sunlight that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

name: early-bird
description: makes sleep pass twice as quickly.

name: effect-spore
description: has a 30% chance of inflcting either paralysis, poison, or sleep on attacking monster on contact.

name: flame-body
description: has a 30% chance of burning attacking monster on contact.

name: flash-fire
description: protects against fire moves.  once one has been blocked, the monster's own fire moves inflict 1.5ã— damage until it leaves battle.

name: forewarn
description: reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.

name: frisk
description: reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.

name: gluttony
description: makes the monster eat any held berry triggered by low hp below 1/2 its max hp.

name: guts
description: increases attack to 1.5ã— with a major status ailment.

name: honey-gather
description: the monster may pick up honey after battle.

name: huge-power
description: doubles attack in battle.

name: hustle
description: strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5ã— damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8ã—.

name: hydration
description: cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.

name: hyper-cutter
description: prevents attack from being lowered by other monster.

name: infiltrator
description: bypasses light screen, reflect, and safeguard.

name: inner-focus
description: prevents flinching.

name: insomnia
description: prevents sleep.

name: intimidate
description: lowers opponents' attack one stage upon entering battle.

name: iron-fist
description: strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2ã— their power.

name: justified
description: raises attack one stage upon taking damage from a dark move.

name: keen-eye
description: prevents accuracy from being lowered.

name: klutz
description: prevents the monster from using its held item in battle.

name: leaf-guard
description: protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.

name: levitate
description: evades ground moves.

name: lightning-rod
description: redirects single-target electric moves to this monster where possible.  absorbs electric moves, raising special attack one stage.

name: limber
description: prevents paralysis.

name: magic-guard
description: protects against damage not directly caused by a move.

name: magician
description: steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.

name: magnet-pull
description: prevents steel opponents from fleeing or switching out.

name: marvel-scale
description: increases defense to 1.5ã— with a major status ailment.

name: mold-breaker
description: bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent a move.

name: motor-drive
description: absorbs electric moves, raising speed one stage.

name: moxie
description: raises attack one stage upon koing a monster.

name: natural-cure
description: cures any major status ailment upon switching out.

name: no-guard
description: ensures all moves used by and against the monster hit.

name: oblivious
description: prevents infatuation and protects against captivate.

name: overgrow
description: strengthens grass moves to inflict 1.5ã— damage at 1/3 max hp or less.

name: own-tempo
description: prevents confusion.

name: pickup
description: picks up other monster's used and flung held items.  may also pick up an item after battle.

name: plus
description: increases special attack to 1.5ã— when a friendly monster has plus or minus.

name: poison-point
description: has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking monster on contact.

name: prankster
description: raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.

name: pressure
description: increases the pp cost of moves targetting the monster by one.

name: rain-dish
description: heals for 1/16 max hp after each turn during rain.

name: rivalry
description: increases damage inflicted to 1.25ã— against monster of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75ã— against the opposite gender.

name: rock-head
description: protects against recoil damage.

name: run-away
description: ensures success fleeing from wild battles.

name: sand-force
description: strengthens rock, ground, and steel moves to 1.3ã— their power during a sandstorm.  protects against sandstorm damage.

name: sand-rush
description: doubles speed during a sandstorm.  protects against sandstorm damage.

name: sand-stream
description: summons a sandstorm that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

name: sand-veil
description: increases evasion to 1.25ã— during a sandstorm.  protects against sandstorm damage.

name: sap-sipper
description: absorbs grass moves, raising attack one stage.

name: scrappy
description: lets the monster's normal and fighting moves hit ghost monster.

name: serene-grace
description: doubles the chance of moves' extra effects occurring.

name: shadow-tag
description: prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.

name: shed-skin
description: has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.

name: sheer-force
description: strengthens moves with extra effects to 1.3ã— their power, but prevents their extra effects.

name: shell-armor
description: protects against critical hits.

name: shield-dust
description: protects against incoming moves' extra effects.

name: skill-link
description: extends two-to-five-hit moves and triple kick to their full length every time.

name: slow-start
description: halves attack and speed for five turns upon entering battle.

name: sniper
description: strengthens critical hits to inflict 3ã— damage rather than 2ã—.

name: snow-warning
description: summons hail that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

name: solar-power
description: increases special attack to 1.5ã— but costs 1/8 max hp after each turn during strong sunlight.

name: soundproof
description: protects against sound-based moves.

name: stamina
description: raises this monster's defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.

name: static
description: has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking monster on contact.

name: stench
description: has a 10% chance of making target monster flinch with each hit.

name: sticky-hold
description: prevents a held item from being removed by other monster.

name: storm-drain
description: redirects single-target water moves to this monster where possible.  absorbs water moves, raising special attack one stage.

name: sturdy
description: prevents being koed from full hp, leaving 1 hp instead.  protects against the one-hit ko moves regardless of hp.

name: super-luck
description: raises moves' critical hit rates one stage.

name: swarm
description: strengthens bug moves to inflict 1.5ã— damage at 1/3 max hp or less.

name: swift-swim
description: doubles speed during rain.

name: synchronize
description: copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the monster that inflicted them.

name: tangled-feet
description: doubles evasion when confused.

name: technician
description: strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5ã— their power.

name: thick-fat
description: halves damage from fire and ice moves.

name: tinted-lens
description: doubles damage inflicted with not-very-effective moves.

name: torrent
description: strengthens water moves to inflict 1.5ã— damage at 1/3 max hp or less.

name: tough-claws
description: strengthens moves that make contact to 1.33ã— their power.

name: unburden
description: doubles speed upon using or losing a held item.

name: unnerve
description: prevents opposing monster from eating held berries.

name: vital-spirit
description: prevents sleep.

name: volt-absorb
description: absorbs electric moves, healing for 1/4 max hp.

name: water-absorb
description: absorbs water moves, healing for 1/4 max hp.

name: weak-armor
description: raises speed and lowers defense by one stage each upon being hit by a physical move.
